rationale: Review 1 identifies a real and material placement issue — foundational typeclasses (`AffineAlgGroup`, `AlgPoints`) and an upstream concept (`IsUnipotent`) living in a file named for a downstream specialization (`Reductive.lean`) — which is visible in the diff regardless of any external roadmap. Acting on it produces a more coherently organized codebase. Review 2's finding (a possibly redundant import) is minor and less directly relevant to the placement rubric.
